name: ticketing-plugin
description: Full-featured ticketing system with server/user linking, categories, priorities, assignments, comments, and real-time notifications
author: Catalyst Team

autoCloseDays.description: Automatically close resolved tickets after this many days (0 to disable)

maxOpenTicketsPerUser.description: Maximum number of open tickets per user (0 for unlimited)

defaultPriority.description: Default priority for new tickets (low, medium, high, critical)

notifyOnAssignment.description: Send WebSocket notification when a ticket is assigned

notifyOnComment.description: Send WebSocket notification on new ticket comments

notifyOnStatusChange.description: Send WebSocket notification on ticket status changes
